# clearpass_admin_privileges (Data Source)

Retrieves a list of ClearPass admin privileges, optionally filtered using a JSON filter expression.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `filter` (String) JSON filter expression to narrow results.

### Read-Only

- `admin_privileges` (Attributes List) List of admin privileges matching the filter. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--admin_privileges))

<a id="nestedatt--admin_privileges"></a>
### Nested Schema for `admin_privileges`

Read-Only:

- `access_type` (String) Access type of the admin privilege.
- `allow_passwords` (Boolean) Whether passwords may be displayed in responses.
- `allow_security_configs` (Boolean) Whether the user has access to security configuration.
- `cppm_privileges` (Map of String) Privilege list for ClearPass Policy Manager.
- `description` (String) Description of the admin privilege.
- `id` (Number) Numeric ID of the admin privilege.
- `insight_privileges` (Map of String) Privilege list for ClearPass Insight.
- `name` (String) Name of the admin privilege.
